defect.reader_effect: The disclosure exposed internal production wording and used a stiff roadmap-not-evidence phrase instead of ordinary public-facing evidence-boundary prose.

changes.summary: Rewrote the tool-use disclosure to use automated development/manuscript-support wording and a natural Figure 1 evidence-boundary sentence.

rejected_iterations.summary: Page-5 embodied-stack opener attempt 1 moved val_unseen but introduced cov- / ers and retained stretched result / official spacing.
Page-5 embodied-stack opener attempt 2 removed covers but introduced benchmark re- / sult: and stretched spacing after sult:.
Page-5 embodied-stack opener attempt 3 fixed the local opener but shifted the right column into worse linebreaks: inter- / vals, se- / lected, eval- / uate, and Roll- / out.
The first ethics disclosure rewrite removed internal wording but shortened the left column so References moved to the left-column bottom.

after_evidence.targeted_scan_result: PDF-visible after text no longer contains AI-based or roadmap is explanatory. The only imagegen hit is the source filename in intro.tex, not rendered PDF text.
after_evidence.visual_result: The accepted page-9 screenshot keeps Ethical Considerations in the left column and References at the top of the right column.

claim_boundary: Ethical Considerations disclosure prose only. No metrics, evidence pools, figures, tables, citations, metadata, or supported/forbidden claim scopes were changed.
residual_risk: The source filename figures/fig_acl_method_chain_imagegen_v18.png still contains imagegen, but that string is not PDF-visible text.
